Abandoned Orc Shovel  
 

Lore Item No Trade Quest Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 27
DMG: 4 Dmg Bonus: 36
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 6.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Abandoned Orc Shovel
Lore Item No Trade Quest Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 27
DMG: 4 Dmg Bonus: 36
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 6.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:2H Blunt
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Mool D'Mojo
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-06 17:13:49
Page Updated:Sun Apr 16th, 2017

Expansion: Original
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 20
[Quests | Comments ]
This item is a ground spawn.

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Butcherblock Mountains
Quest Name
Chalice of Conquest

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Lake Rathetear
Found lying on the ground in Lake Rathetear near /loc +3486, -663, -27

Abandoned Orc Shovel item window 2017

Uploaded May 15th, 2017 by snailish
Send a correction
Post Comment
Abandoned Orc Shovel
QuoteReply
# Apr 15 2017 at 11:49 AM Rating: Good
nerina819
Sage
68 posts
The orc shovel is indeed in the orc tent; the problem was finding the orcs.

After zoning in from The Mountains of Rath; take a right and go pas the Merchants and the bandits. The tents are on a small pier with orcs standing around them.

or those that are good with co-ordinates, it is around 3486.15, -663.23, -27.06.
▲ Page top
Abandoned Orc Shovel

After zoning in from The Mountains of Rath; take a right and go pas the Merchants and the bandits. The tents are on a small pier with orcs standing around them.

or those that are good with co-ordinates, it is around 3486.15, -663.23, -27.06.


Thanks, added.

Grabbed this shovel for my little necro on Time-locked progression server today.

Same place it always has been, on the ground in the 2nd tent.

Picked it up invis, so was safe at level 8 to grab it. Orcs conned red to me.

location of shovel
QuoteReply
# Dec 17 2002 at 3:00 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591772738273
77 posts
if you can't find it on the ground in the orc camp in Lake Rathetear, try peeking in the tents, look for a shovel. just grabbed one today =D.

http://www.eqatlas.com/atlas.html

follow the links to the lake rathetear map
▲ Page top
RE: location of shovel
QuoteReply
# Jun 01 2004 at 9:24 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592258542685
12 posts
The exact spawn location of this weapon is 3500, -620. It is inside the back tent at the orc camp, which is located along the northern shore of Lake Rathetear between the cabin and ogre camp.

As of 6/1/04, most of the stats are correct. The shovel is Medium-sized, has a Slot-1, Type-4 Augment slot, 4-Damage, 27-Delay, 6 pounds, etc.

Unless you're a monk, if you want to work on your two-handed blunt skill, this is the pretty much one of the best weapons to use.
▲ Page top
All hail the shovel
QuoteReply

301 posts

see the Rangers Glade for the awesome power of this weapon

Which zone where you in? If you're wandering around Rathe Mountains, you're in the wrong zone. It says it is found in Lake Rathetear. It also may not have a set loc. Might be a random ground spawn.

# Jul 29 2001 at 9:32 AM Rating: Default

3,705 posts
This would be wonderful to have. I've got a Drakkel forged Sledgehammer, and Just reached level 20, so the damage cap is off, but have not kept my triaing up in 2HB and need to get skill up fast. The Sledge hits so slow, it is worthless to train with. My 1HB is a Wraith Bone hammer, so I'm already maxxed in 1HB, one Bubble into lvl 20.

#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 18 2001 at 7:58 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) how can a NO DROP item have a range????
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 18 2001 at 7:58 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post)
Holy Relic!
QuoteReply
# Apr 09 2001 at 1:41 PM Rating: Excellent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
"It's is difficult for non-rangers to understand the respect and dedication that we rangers hold for "the Shovel". The Abandoned Orc Shovel is an elegant weapon from eons past, not clumsy like a Yak. It is a weapon that we rangers revere. It is written in the ranger chronicles that one does not find the Abandoned Orc Shovel, it chooses you if you are deemed worthy. There is an ancient society that all rangers who have been chosen belong to. It is the Order of the Shovel, its purpose is to promote the way of the shovel, to master its form, and to bonk all enemies, as well as bless those in need with healing bonks. To be at one with bonking, and being bonked. There is only path for a ranger and that is the path of the Shovel.

This is but a very fragmentary explanation, to truly understand the way of the shovel, one must spend a lifetime seeking its meaning. As I am only an initiate, I fear that no feeble words of mine will do the Shovel justice."
▲ Page top
RE: Holy Relic!
QuoteReply
# Jul 14 2002 at 10:25 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591780539252
59 posts
Sounds like someone saw Mystery Men

QuoteReply
# Jul 16 2001 at 5:19 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591757678681

▲ Page top
Correct Location of the Item
QuoteReply
# Dec 27 2000 at 3:52 AM Rating: Excellent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
The Abandoned Orc Shovel is not dropped by alligators. It is lying near the fire in the small orc camp in Lake Rathetear. Practically anyone who can reach Lake Rathe can walk into the orc camp and pick up the shovel with ease, since the orc centurions are such low level.

This is a VERY handy item for raising the 2HB skill however, since (at least currently) it is the fastest one in the game.

The item called "Shovel" does drop from gators in Cazic Thule, and is the one required for the mage focus quest. Maybe that's what somebody was thinking about when they listed this?

/shrug
▲ Page top
RE: Correct Location of the Item
QuoteReply
# Nov 11 2002 at 11:45 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592255672695
Sage
202 posts
But as a side note to any mages reading this, just get the shovel for the focus item quests from the dark elf mage chicks in Najena. Its much much easier. I did the focus item quests at level 32-35 and I walked all over those tramps. Once you hit 34 and get Cinder Bolt they are one spell dead and you don't even have to bother with the pet, it evaporates on their death if you haven't aggroed it.

Edited, Mon Nov 11 11:25:09 2002
